slides.headline: 5 prompts that run your coaching admin.
The caption prompt
body: "Turn these bullet points into a caption in my voice.
Hook first, one idea, a soft CTA."
A blank page becomes a draft.

slides.headline: The DM prompt
body: "Here's a message. Give me three on-brand replies —
Clear the inbox without the dread.

slides.headline: The repurpose prompt
body: "Turn this post into a 30-second video script
and two short posts for X."

slides.headline: The boundary prompt
body: "A client said this. Draft a kind, honest reply

slides.headline: The planning prompt
body: "Here's my offer. Give me five content angles
for this week, one per pillar."
Never start the week from zero.

slides.headline: Want them as a pack?
slides.subtext: Saved and ready in the Prompt Pack.
